name: nebula-discover
description: Public, open-source discovery module concept for Nebula: turns a sensing objective into public construct hypotheses, mechanism routes, synthetic multimodal measurement signatures, rationale, uncertainty, and a claim-safe measurement handoff.

scripts.gen:contracts: cd backend && python3 -c "import json;from app.api.main import app;open('openapi.json','w').write(json.dumps(app.openapi(),indent=2))" && cd .. && openapi-typescript backend/openapi.json -o src/contracts/api.ts
